arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal confident over big name and also want to sign £50m Premier League star
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly confident over keeping hold of William Saliba despite ongoing transfer interest from Real Madrid. On top of that, it’s being claimed that the Gunners want to sign £50m-rated Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen to play alongside both Saliba and Gabriel, rather than replace either of them. arts.sum: Manchester United favourite Antonio Valencia has admitted he had the chance to join Real Madrid, but his family convinced him to stay where he was. Marca cover comments from the Ecuador defender today as he speaks about Manchester United, Real Madrid vs Arsenal and how he nearly joined the Spanish giants.
